overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a rainy night in a historic New Orleans-style city. The character traverses covered boardwalks, open plazas, and cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden boardwalk along historic street

events.description: exits covered wooden walkway into open town plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered boardwalk beside historic buildings in heavy rain

entered.detail: covered wooden walkway with roof providing shelter from rain
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light through the rain
wooden porch with columns attached to brick building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked covered wooden boardwalk next to historic buildings. Gas street lamps cast warm light through the heavy rain as the character approaches an opening into a wider town plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town plaza with central monument

events.description: character turns left while crossing the plaza toward the large building
approaching large classical building with stone columns

agents.ego_description: turning left while walking across the open plaza toward a large classical building

iron and wood benches along the left side of the plaza
large building with tall stone columns and classical architecture

segments.scene_description: Moving into the open plaza, the character turns left while passing a central monument obelisk. The rain continues to fall heavily on the cobblestones as a large classical building with columns comes into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with classical architecture and iron fencing

events.description: passing the classical building and entering commercial district

agents.ego_description: walking past the grand stone building with iron fencing and Spanish moss trees

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence along the sidewalk
large oak tree with hanging Spanish moss

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside an impressive classical stone building with tall columns and iron fencing. Spanish moss hangs from the trees as the character moves past the building toward a more commercial area.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage visible ahead on the left side of street

agents.ego_description: walking down the commercial street approaching a horse-drawn carriage

notable_agents.action: horse standing harnessed to carriage on the left side of the street

entered.detail: row of shops with lit windows and decorative facades
wooden carriage with white horse parked on the street
red rectangular sign hanging from building facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a commercial district with lit storefronts and hanging signs. A horse-drawn carriage stands on the left side of the rain-slicked cobblestone street as the character continues walking through the historic city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched historic city, transitioning from a sheltered boardwalk into an expansive plaza and finally into a bustling commercial district. It begins alongside rain-soaked wooden boardwalks where gas lamps cast a warm glow through the heavy downpour. As the character reaches the end of the walkway, the scene opens into a wide cobblestone plaza, passing a central monument obelisk before revealing a grand classical building with towering columns. The camera then tracks alongside this stone edifice and its iron fencing, moving past trees draped in Spanish moss as the environment shifts toward a more urban center. Finally, the path leads into a commercial district filled with lit storefronts and hanging signs, passing a horse-drawn carriage parked on the slick, reflective streets.
